'''yafaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yachtsmanship|yachtsmanship]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-f-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yachtsmanship|yachtsmanship]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| yafaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæfæbæth|yæfæbæth]] || [[word:yæfæbæj|yæfæbæj]] || [[word:yæfæbæsh|yæfæbæsh]] || [[word:yæfæbæ|yæfæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yafafabath|yafafabath]] || [[word:yafafabaj|yafafabaj]] || [[word:yafafabash|yafafabash]] || [[word:yafafaba|yafafaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yafabath|yafabath]] || [[word:yafabaj|yafabaj]] || [[word:yafabash|yafabash]] || [[word:yafaba|yafaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yafafbath|yafafbath]] || [[word:yafafbaj|yafafbaj]] || [[word:yafafbash|yafafbash]] || [[word:yafafbaf|yafafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yafabatha|yafabatha]] || [[word:yafabaja|yafabaja]] || [[word:yafabasha|yafabasha]] || [[word:yafabaka|yafabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yafabath|yafabath]] || [[word:yafabaj|yafabaj]] || [[word:yafabash|yafabash]] || [[word:yafaba|yafaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yafabathal|yafabathal]] || [[word:yafabajal|yafabajal]] || [[word:yafabashal|yafabashal]] || [[word:yafabakal|yafabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yafabathatha|yafabathatha]] || [[word:yafabajaja|yafabajaja]] || [[word:yafabashasha|yafabashasha]] || [[word:yafabaka|yafabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yafabathan|yafabathan]] || [[word:yafabajan|yafabajan]] || [[word:yafabashan|yafabashan]] || [[word:yafabakan|yafabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yafabathaoro|yafabathaoro]] || [[word:yafabajaoro|yafabajaoro]] || [[word:yafabashaoro|yafabashaoro]] || [[word:yafabakaoro|yafabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
